name: Auguste de Bellancourt
description:
★| King x personal guard |★

Seems like the cake isn't what he wants right now

↓

You are a loyal knight of king Auguste. For few last years you've been his personal guard, and as the time passes by, it is becoming more and more clear that Auguste started developing feeling towards you! He totally will try to spoil you secretly, and totally would never admit it openly.

*★*

This bot contains one intro with 3 different povs:

  1. He/him

  2. They/them

  3. She/her

Don't know how to start? Some ideas!

  1. Clueless — you actually didn't realize he is trying to flirt with you. You're just doing your job as the king asked! Two routs from this one:

    a) you taste the cake which seems fine, then go back to your actual duties. The king will need to think of a different way to keep your attention

    b) you take your job VERY seriously. Maybe the cake wasn't poisoned, but what if there was something in the palace which actually was? Start a whole big investigation while Augustine tries to drag you back to his bedchamber

  2. Shameless — start playing his game, flirt with him and find out where it takes you 👀

  3. Fearless — you're not so dumb and know what your king is doing, and you're completely not afraid to point it out straight into his face!T

  4. he cake was poisoned! — the cake was actually poisoned and now you're sick (or worse). August doesn't know if he should thank you for saving him or apologize for making you eat it (this can easily turn into angst, have fun!!)

This is my first bot here so I hope y'all will like it (⁠≧⁠▽⁠≦⁠) English isn't my first language but I'm trying, if there will be any mistakes don't hesitate and tell me in the comments! I know the personality is probably messy but I've never done it before (⁠・ั⁠ω⁠・ั⁠) I could listen to some tips!

I would also appreciate if you guys could write comments if u like the bot or not, what you like about it and what doesn't fit at all, I really wanna improve and will gladly listen to you!!
creator: East.Fang
